steps.title: Overall Visual Inspection
steps.description: Overall visual inspection for any damage
steps.detail: Walk around the cab and check the exterior for any visible damage, dents, scratches, or defects.

steps.title: Mirrors & Brackets
steps.description: Check and secure mirrors and brackets
steps.detail: Check that the side view mirror is not loose, damaged, or broken. Ensure brackets are secure.

steps.title: Driver Seat & Seat Belt
steps.description: Check drivers (O/S) seat operation and seat belt function and anchorage
steps.detail: Check the driver's seat position adjustment and seat belt operation and security.

steps.title: Windows & Doors
steps.description: Check operation of windows and doors
steps.detail: Check windows and doors for correct operation. Open and close each to verify smooth function.

steps.title: DXII Diagnostics
steps.description: DXII - plug in and check for updates
steps.detail: Plug in DXII diagnostic tool and check for any system updates or fault codes.

steps.title: Starter & Engine Stop
steps.description: Check starter motor operation and engine stop function
steps.detail: Check operation of starter and confirm correct operation of stop function.

steps.title: Abnormal Noises
steps.description: Report all abnormal noises and vibrations
steps.detail: Listen for any unusual sounds or vibrations from the engine, transmission, or chassis while driving.

steps.title: Gauges & Instruments
steps.description: Check operation of all gauges and instruments
steps.detail: Check the operation of the tachometer, fuel gauge, water temperature gauge, and air pressure gauge.

steps.title: Wipers & Washers
steps.description: Check wiper/washer operation arc and blade condition
steps.detail: Check that the window wiper/washer operation and condition. Also check the nozzles are not loose or damaged.

steps.title: Accelerator Pedal
steps.description: Check accelerator pedal and linkage for operation and wear
steps.detail: Check all pedals and linkage for wear and correct operation. Ensure smooth travel.

steps.title: Brake Pedal Travel
steps.description: Check brake pedal travel and adjust if required
steps.detail: Check that the play of brake pedal is within the specified range and adjust if required.

steps.title: Park Brake
steps.description: Check and adjust park brake operation
steps.detail: Vehicles with centre parking brake: Check the pull allowance of the parking lever. Vehicles with wheel parking brake: Check for the sound of escaping air at the time of brake operation.

steps.title: Transmission Controls
steps.description: Check transmission controls
steps.detail: Check that the shift lever operates smoothly and engages all gears correctly.

steps.title: Coolant Level
steps.description: Check coolant level and top up as required
steps.detail: Check coolant level and concentration. Top up if below minimum mark.

steps.title: All Lights
steps.description: Check all lights for operation
steps.detail: Test all lights for operation: headlights, indicators, stop lights, fog lights, interior lights, etc.

steps.title: Reverse Buzzer
steps.description: Check reverse buzzer
steps.detail: Check the operation of the back-up lamp and buzzer sound.

steps.title: Auxiliary Lights
steps.description: Check clearance and auxiliary or driving lights
steps.detail: Check the operation of auxiliary lights, clearance lights, and driving lights.

steps.title: Brake/Clutch Fluid
steps.description: Check and top up brake (clutch) fluid reservoir - report any leaks
steps.detail: Check that the brake and clutch fluid level is within the specified range. Report any leaks found.

steps.title: Washer Bottle & Cabin Filter
steps.description: Check and top up windscreen washer bottle, check the cabin air filter
steps.detail: Check that the windshield washer solution level is within the specified range. Inspect cabin air filter condition.

steps.title: Passenger Seat & Belt
steps.description: Check passengers (N/S) seat operation and seat belt function and anchorage
steps.detail: Check the passenger's seat position adjustment and seat belt operation. Including the centre seat.

steps.title: Air Cleaner Element
steps.description: Inspect and clean air cleaner element
steps.detail: Inspect and clean air cleaner element with compressed air. Check that piping is not loose or crushed.

steps.title: Fuel Filters
steps.description: Replace fuel sediment filter and fuel filter
steps.detail: Remove and replace fuel sediment filter. Check that filter, hose, and pipes are not loose or leaking fuel.

steps.title: Battery Box
steps.description: Inspect battery box
steps.detail: Check battery box security. Ensure carrier and cables are not loose.

steps.title: Battery Load Test
steps.description: Load test battery and report
steps.detail: Test battery specific gravity with hydrometer and report condition. Load test if required.

steps.title: Battery Electrolyte
steps.description: Top up battery electrolyte
steps.detail: Check battery electrolyte level and top up as required to within the specified range.

steps.title: Battery Terminals
steps.description: Clean and lubricate battery terminals and check for corrosion, cabin air cleaner
steps.detail: Clean and lubricate battery terminals with terminal lube. Check for corrosion on terminals and cables.

steps.title: Body Lubrication
steps.description: Clean and lubricate all body - door hinges, locks, tailgate pivots and locks, tipper pivots and hoist pivots
steps.detail: Check and lubricate all body fixtures: door hinges, locks, tailgate pivots and locks, tipper pivots and hoist points.

steps.title: Fuel & PS Hoses
steps.description: Inspect all fuel lines and power steering hoses for chafing and leaks
steps.detail: Inspect all fuel lines and power steering hoses for chafing and leaks. Look for wear marks and fluid seepage.

steps.title: Steering Linkages
steps.description: Inspect steering linkages - lubricate all points - report all wear and damage
steps.detail: Check that there is no fluid leakage from the gear box and PS pipes. Check the universal joint for stiffness. Lubricate all grease points.

steps.title: Drain Engine Oil
steps.description: Drain engine oil
steps.detail: Remove drain plug and drain engine oil completely. Clean drain plug and surrounding area.

steps.title: Replace Oil Filter
steps.description: Replace oil filter
steps.detail: Remove old oil filter using strap wrench. Install new filter, hand tighten then snug with tool.

steps.title: Front Axle U-Bolts
steps.description: Tighten front axle U-bolts and spring bands
steps.detail: Check that the leaf spring U-bolts are tightened correctly to specified torque.

steps.title: Engine Mounts
steps.description: Check all engine mounts
steps.detail: Check that engine mounting bolts are not loose. Inspect rubber mounts for cracking or deterioration.

steps.title: Transmission Mounts
steps.description: Check transmissions mounts
steps.detail: Check that transmission mounting bolts are secure. Inspect mount condition.

steps.title: Transmission Linkage
steps.description: Check transmissions linkage connections
steps.detail: Check that transmission linkage connections are secure and operate smoothly.

steps.title: DPR Sensor Wiring
steps.description: Check DPR sensor wiring and hose for damage
steps.detail: Inspect DPR sensor wiring and hose connections for damage, chafing, or loose connectors.

steps.title: DPR Exhaust System
steps.description: Check DPR exhaust system for tension and leaks
steps.detail: Check that the exhaust pipe, DPR filter and hanger are not loose and for exhaust leaks.

steps.title: Gearbox Oil Level
steps.description: Check gearbox oil level and top up - report any leaks (manual trans only)
steps.detail: Check that the transmission oil level is up to the position of the filling plug. Top up as required.

steps.title: Clutch Free Travel
steps.description: Check clutch free travel and report hydraulic oil leaks
steps.detail: Check that the clutch pedal free play is within specification. Check secondary cylinder is not loose. Report any hydraulic leaks.

steps.title: Universal Joints
steps.description: Inspect and lubricate universal joints and drive shafts
steps.detail: Check that the propeller shaft and centre bearing bolts are not loose. Lubricate universal joints with grease gun.

steps.title: Park Brake Linings
steps.description: Check park brake lining thickness
steps.detail: Measure park brake lining thickness with vernier calipers. Report if below minimum specification.

steps.title: Body Mountings
steps.description: Secure all body/equipment mountings and U-bolts
steps.detail: Check that the rear body and frame brackets are not loose. Tighten all body mounting U-bolts.

steps.title: Differential Oil
steps.description: Check differential oil level and top up as required - report any leaks
steps.detail: Check that the differential gear oil level is at the position of the filler plug. Top up as required.

steps.title: Shackles & Wear Plates
steps.description: Inspect shackles and wear plates - lubricate all points (if applicable)
steps.detail: Check suspension shackles and wear plates for excessive wear. Lubricate all grease points.

steps.title: Rear Axle U-Bolts
steps.description: Tighten rear axle U-bolts and spring bands
steps.detail: Check that the rear leaf spring U-bolts are tightened correctly to specified torque.

steps.title: Bridging Jacks
steps.description: Align bridging jacks to axles and raise vehicle
steps.detail: Position bridging jacks under axles. Raise vehicle to allow wheel removal.

steps.title: Wheel Bearing Freeplay
steps.description: Check wheel bearing freeplay
steps.detail: Rock each wheel to check for bearing freeplay. Report any excessive movement.

steps.title: N/S/F Wheel & Tyre
steps.description: Remove N/S/F wheel. Check tyre wear and report. Top up tyre pressure as required
steps.detail: Remove near-side front wheel. Inspect tyre tread depth and wear pattern. Check and adjust tyre pressure to specification.

steps.title: N/S/F Mudflap & Arch
steps.description: Check N/S/F mudflap and wheel arch
steps.detail: Inspect near-side front mudflap security and wheel arch condition.

steps.title: N/S/F Brakes
steps.description: Check N/S/F service brakes - record lining thickness remaining
steps.detail: Inspect near-side front brake linings. Measure and record lining thickness remaining with vernier calipers.

steps.title: N/S/F Shock Absorber
steps.description: Inspect N/S/F shock absorber and bushes, tension mounts
steps.detail: Check that the near-side front shock absorber is not loose, leaking, and is free of play. Check bushes and mounts.

steps.title: N/S/R Wheels & Tyres
steps.description: Remove N/S/R wheels. Check tyre wear and report. Top up tyre pressure as required
steps.detail: Remove near-side rear wheels. Inspect tyre tread depth and wear pattern. Check and adjust tyre pressure.

steps.title: N/S/R Mudflaps
steps.description: Check N/S/R mudflaps
steps.detail: Inspect near-side rear mudflap security and condition.

steps.title: N/S/R Brakes
steps.description: Check N/S/R service brakes - record lining thickness remaining
steps.detail: Inspect near-side rear brake linings. Measure and record lining thickness with vernier calipers.

steps.title: N/S/R Shock Absorber
steps.description: Inspect N/S/R shock absorber and bushes, tension mounts
steps.detail: Check that the near-side rear shock absorber is not loose, leaking, and is free of play.

steps.title: O/S/R Wheels & Tyres
steps.description: Remove O/S/R wheels. Check tyre wear and report. Top up tyre pressure as required
steps.detail: Remove off-side rear wheels. Inspect tyre tread depth and wear pattern. Check and adjust tyre pressure.

steps.title: O/S/R Mudflaps
steps.description: Check O/S/R mudflaps
steps.detail: Inspect off-side rear mudflap security and condition.

steps.title: O/S/R Brakes
steps.description: Check O/S/R service brakes - record lining thickness remaining
steps.detail: Inspect off-side rear brake linings. Measure and record lining thickness with vernier calipers.

steps.title: O/S/R Shock Absorber
steps.description: Inspect O/S/R shock absorber and bushes, tension mounts
steps.detail: Check that the off-side rear shock absorber is not loose, leaking, and is free of play.

steps.title: O/S/F Wheel & Tyre
steps.description: Remove O/S/F wheel. Check tyre wear and report. Top up tyre pressure as required
steps.detail: Remove off-side front wheel. Inspect tyre tread depth and wear pattern. Check and adjust tyre pressure.

steps.title: O/S/F Mudflap & Arch
steps.description: Check O/S/F mudflap and wheel arch
steps.detail: Inspect off-side front mudflap security and wheel arch condition.

steps.title: O/S/F Brakes
steps.description: Check O/S/F service brakes - record lining thickness remaining
steps.detail: Inspect off-side front brake linings. Measure and record lining thickness with vernier calipers.

steps.title: O/S/F Shock Absorber
steps.description: Inspect O/S/F shock absorber and bushes, tension mounts
steps.detail: Check that the off-side front shock absorber is not loose, leaking, and is free of play.

steps.title: Disc Caliper Rubbers
steps.description: Check rubber parts for disc calipers
steps.detail: Inspect rubber seals, boots, and hoses on all disc brake calipers for cracking or damage.

steps.title: Hydraulic Fluid Leaks
steps.description: Check hydraulic fluid for leaks
steps.detail: Inspect all hydraulic lines, hoses, and fittings for fluid leaks.

steps.title: Rotate Wheels
steps.description: Rotate wheels
steps.detail: Rotate wheels according to the prescribed pattern for even tyre wear.

steps.title: Wheel Nut Retention
steps.description: Retention all wheel retaining nuts
steps.detail: Torque all wheel retaining nuts to specification. Use star pattern for even tightening.

steps.title: Exhaust Manifolds
steps.description: Check exhaust manifolds for tension and leaks
steps.detail: Check that the exhaust manifold bolts are tight to specification. Check for exhaust gas leaks.

steps.title: Heater & Radiator Hoses
steps.description: Inspect heater hoses and radiator hoses for condition and leaks
steps.detail: Inspect all heater and radiator hoses for cracking, swelling, or leaks. Check clamp tightness.

steps.title: Refill Engine Oil
steps.description: Refill engine oil
steps.detail: Fill engine with correct grade and quantity of oil. Check level on dipstick.

steps.title: Auto Trans Fluid
steps.description: Check automatic transmission fluid
steps.detail: Check automatic transmission fluid level and condition. Top up if required.

steps.title: Inlet Manifold
steps.description: Check inlet manifold and ducting for tension and leaks
steps.detail: Check that inlet manifold bolts are tight. Inspect ducting connections for air leaks.

steps.title: Radiator Cap
steps.description: Check radiator cap function
steps.detail: Check radiator cap seal and pressure release function. Replace if defective.

steps.title: Radiator & Intercooler
steps.description: Inspect radiator and intercooler fins, clean as required
steps.detail: Inspect radiator and intercooler fins for blockage or damage. Clean with compressed air if required.

steps.title: Drive Belts
steps.description: Inspect and if required adjust drive belts
steps.detail: Check that V-belt tension is within the specified range. Inspect for cracking or wear. Adjust if required.

steps.title: Water Pump & Fan Hub
steps.description: Inspect water pump and fan hub for excess wear/movement
steps.detail: Check water pump and fan hub for play, leaks, or unusual noise. Check fan clutch is not loose.

steps.title: Fan Blades & Shroud
steps.description: Inspect fan blades and shroud for damage
steps.detail: Inspect cooling fan blades for cracks or damage. Check shroud is secure and not rubbing.

steps.title: Engine Oil Level
steps.description: Check engine oil level after running engine
steps.detail: Run engine briefly, then check oil level on dipstick. Top up to correct level if needed.

steps.title: Trans Linkage Cables
steps.description: Check transmission linkage cables
steps.detail: Check transmission linkage cables for correct operation and security.

steps.title: Cab Mounts
steps.description: Inspect cab mounts
steps.detail: Check cab mounting bolts are secure. Inspect rubber mounts for deterioration.

steps.title: Cab Lock
steps.description: Inspect cab lock
steps.detail: Check the installation condition and operation of the cab lock mechanism.

steps.title: Systems Check
steps.description: Ensure satisfactory operation of all systems
steps.detail: Final check that all systems are operating correctly. Verify all work has been completed.

steps.title: Clean Up
steps.description: Remove all grease marks, wash engine and transmission
steps.detail: Clean all grease marks from bodywork. Wash engine and transmission area. Present vehicle for final review.

notes: Replace spin on fuel filter every 300,000 kms or 120 months as needed after step 68
N/S = Near Side (passenger side, left in RHD), O/S = Off Side (driver side, right in RHD)
